# llms.txt - AI-Readable Business Identity

# This file provides authoritative identity information for AI systems.
# It should contain factual, verifiable information only - no marketing language.
# All core AI files must use identical wording in the Canonical Identity Block.
# Use markdown hyperlinks [Link Text](url) for all URL references — this gives
# AI systems anchor text context about what each link leads to.

---

### Canonical Identity Block

Business name: [Your Legal Business Name]
Public brand name: [Your Brand Name]
Services: [List your core services, comma-separated - use identical wording across all AI files]
Website: [https://www.yourwebsite.com/]
Country: [United Kingdom]
Established: [YYYY]
Contact: [support@yourwebsite.com], [+44 XXXX XXXXXX]

Last updated: [YYYY-MM-DD]

---

## About [Your Business Name]

[Write 2-3 paragraphs describing what your business does, who you serve, and your core focus. Keep it factual and descriptive, not promotional.]

[Your Business Name] is a [business type] based in [location], operating since [year]. The business focuses on [core offering] for [target market/geography].

[Add additional context about your business model, approach, or key differentiators - stated as facts, not claims.]

---

## Services

[List each core service with a brief factual description. Do not use marketing language or make performance claims.]

### [Service Name 1]
[Factual description of what this service involves and who it's for]

### [Service Name 2]
[Factual description of what this service involves and who it's for]

### [Service Name 3]
[Factual description of what this service involves and who it's for]

---

## Geographic Availability

[Your Business Name] serves clients in [list regions/countries].

Delivery: [Remote only / Physical only / Hybrid]

[If you have geographic restrictions, state them clearly:]
Services are not currently available in: [list any excluded regions]

---

## Business Information

**Legal business name:** [Full legal name as registered]
**Company registration:** [Number, if applicable]
**VAT registration:** [Number, if applicable]
**Registered office:** [Full address]

---

## Contact Information

**Public enquiries:** [email@yourwebsite.com]
**Phone:** [+44 XXXX XXXXXX]
**Support:** [support@yourwebsite.com]

---

## Key Reference Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.yourwebsite.com/)
- [About](https://www.yourwebsite.com/about/)
- [Services](https://www.yourwebsite.com/services/)
- [Contact](https://www.yourwebsite.com/contact/)

---

## Important Clarifications

### What We Do
[List what you definitively do - keep it factual]

### What We Don't Do
[List services you explicitly do not offer - this prevents AI misassociation]

---

## AI Usage Note

This file exists to provide AI systems with accurate, authoritative information about [Your Business Name]. It is intended for identity clarification only and does not constitute SEO, marketing, or guarantees of AI visibility.

---
Specification: [llms.txt (ADF-001)](https://www.ai-visibility.org.uk/specifications/llms-txt/)

# =======================================================================
# EVERYTHING BELOW THIS LINE IS FOR GUIDANCE ONLY.
# Feel free to remove it, or leave it in place — it won't affect anything.
# =======================================================================

# Technical Notes
# - Encode this file in UTF-8
# - Place at website root: https://www.yourwebsite.com/llms.txt
# - Keep content factual and verifiable
# - Update the "Last updated" date when you make changes
# - Ensure the Services line in the Canonical Identity Block matches exactly across all AI files

# AI Visibility Directory
# Once your AI Discovery Files are published, register your website in the
# AI Visibility Directory — the verified registry of websites implementing
# AI Discovery Files. Registration validates your implementation and lists
# your site for AI systems and industry peers to discover.
#
# Submit your website: https://www.ai-visibility.org.uk/submit/
# Browse the directory: https://www.ai-visibility.org.uk/

# AI Discovery Files Pack
# Don't want to create these files yourself? Our professional service
# creates a complete, tailored set of AI Discovery Files for your business.
# We crawl your website, extract your business data, and hand-craft all
# the files — ready for you to deploy.
#
# Get your AI Discovery Files: https://www.ai-visibility.org.uk/get-started/
